task_updates.executor_notes: Added `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayBridge.tsx`, `overlayDom.ts`, and `index.ts` to centralize overlay bridge infrastructure. The bridge registers overlays only while popup/backdrop elements are actually mounted, rewrites tracked elements when refs move, stamps shared overlay metadata onto live DOM nodes, unregisters on close/teardown, and exposes narrow hooks for the current overlay handle, topmost state, and element-based topmost checks. Added focused coverage in `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayBridge.test.tsx` for DOM-presence-driven registration, nested topmost hooks, and marker-compatible DOM helper fallbacks. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayBridge.test.tsx src/shared/state/overlayStack.test.ts`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The new bridge registers only while popup/backdrop DOM exists, keeps overlay identity stable through context, exposes current-handle/topmost hooks including element-based topmost checks, and adds shared DOM helpers that preserve legacy marker-based behavior during M2.
